name: polaris
description: Polaris OS out of the box: session lifecycle skills (start/update/end/pol-report), polmem CLI (recall/remember against the repo's committed memory bundle), team-workflow standard + bootstrap, and the workflow MCP servers (context7, sequential-thinking, codebase-memory). Run /pol-bootstrap in a repo to align it; /start, /update, /end for the session lifecycle.
